testcase.name: kiemThuDangNhap[standard_user, secret_sauce, THANH_CONG, TC01 - Tài khoản standard hợp lệ](1)
testcase.system-out: ▶ Bắt đầu test: kiemThuDangNhap ─── TC01 - Tài khoản standard hợp lệ ─── username=[standard_user] | password=[secret_sauce] Kết quả mong đợi: THANH_CONG ✅ URL hiện tại: https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html

SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
